{"id":"project-LICHEN-9jlb","title":"No concurrency protection for adapter state","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c (entire adapter struct)
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/include/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.h:257-268

The lichen_meshtastic_adapter struct contains mutable state (stats, stream_buf, from_radio_id, disconnected) that could be accessed concurrently:

1. lichen_meshtastic_adapter_feed_stream() from RX interrupt/thread
2. lichen_meshtastic_adapter_emit_text() from TX thread  
3. lichen_meshtastic_adapter_get_stats() from monitoring thread

There are no synchronization primitives (mutex, spinlock, atomic).

For embedded use cases, callers may serialize access externally, but:
1. This requirement should be documented in the header
2. Stats counters (especially increment operations) could use atomic types

Consider adding a note to adapter.h documenting thread-safety requirements.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:48:34.91701Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:48:34.917043Z"}

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/include/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.h:257-268

The lichen_meshtastic_adapter struct contains mutable state (stats, stream_buf, from_radio_id, disconnected) that could be accessed concurrently:

1. lichen_meshtastic_adapter_feed_stream() from RX interrupt/thread
2. lichen_meshtastic_adapter_emit_text() from TX thread  
3. lichen_meshtastic_adapter_get_stats() from monitoring thread

There are no synchronization primitives (mutex, spinlock, atomic).

For embedded use cases, callers may serialize access externally, but:
1. This requirement should be documented in the header
2. Stats counters (especially increment operations) could use atomic types

Consider adding a note to adapter.h documenting thread-safety requirements.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:48:34.91701Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:06:02.652284447Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:06:02.652284447Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:11:02.652284447Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:06:02.652284447Z"}
